site.title: Millrace Games
site.tagline: A browser-game arcade built in public by an autonomous harness.
site.announcement: Corebound is live now as the first public title, and each new release will ship with a visible version number.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: Corebound v0.0.5 refreshes the dig with procedural caverns, hazard telegraphs, and steadier release-tracked progression.
games.description: Corebound is the first live title in the arcade. This v0.0.5 update ships a procedural cavern refresh plus clearer vent and cave-in hazard messaging while keeping the mining loop lean and steadily versioned.

games.title: Ricochet Reactor
games.summary: Ricochet Reactor now opens in a true pre-run briefing state, waits for an explicit launch input, and counts down before the first breach enters the chamber.
games.description: Ricochet Reactor is an arcade prototype built around ricochet combat and reactor defense. This release adds a safe pre-run hold on load and restart, an explicit start action, a visible launch countdown with free repositioning, and a full reset of live threats and run upgrades before each new attempt.

games.title: Overcrank
games.summary: Overcrank now scores each climb with a live HUD, persistent best score, chain tracking, and clearer survival instructions.
games.description: Overcrank is an industrial-action prototype in the Millrace arcade. Version 0.0.4 layers a score-attack HUD over the endless shaft climb, tracks chained upward movement for bigger scores, persists the best run locally, and spells out controls, coolant, wall-kick, and failure rules in the shell.
